name: I hurt my shoulder working construction in Boise Idaho—does workers comp cover me here?
description: Yes, Idaho workers' comp covers on-the-job injuries; report immediately.[4]

mainEntity.name: I hurt my shoulder working construction in Boise Idaho—does workers comp cover me here?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Idaho workers' comp covers on-the-job injuries; report immediately.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if injured on the job in Idaho, you're eligible for workers' compensation benefits through your employer's insurance.** Covers medical care and wage replacement without proving fault.[4] Key factors: Report immediately; employer handles insurer filing; third-party negligence may allow extra claims. Seek medical attention, document everything, avoid signing away rights. Idaho follows similar no-fault rules to Utah—get local advice promptly.
